title: TensorScatterUpdate malformed indices abort process

source.document: 基于大语言模型的深度学习库模糊测试.pdf
source.section: 附录 缺陷触发代码示例

trigger: Pass rank-3 indices with scalar-like updates to TensorScatterUpdate.
expected: TensorFlow should reject malformed scatter index/update shapes with InvalidArgumentError.
observed: The process aborts after a CHECK failure: d < dims() (1 vs. 1).
